pattern_1.transformation: Parse logger timestamp as fixed Mountain Standard Time (Etc/GMT+7) and convert to UTC ISO-8601 string.
Resolve plot, point, and vegetation class from sensor metadata by Sensor.SN with payload values as fallback; concatenate as Plot_Point_Veg.
Look up sensor installation depth by Sensor.SN. Exclude rows for sensor 9731453 because metadata states it was out of the ground and no depth is reported.
pattern_1.unit_conversion: Divide by 100 to convert cm to m.

pattern_1.transformation: Sort Sensor.SN values within each site_id and depth_m and assign dense integer replicate numbers starting at 1.
Coerce Measurement to numeric after retaining valid in-ground SWC sensor rows.
pattern_1.unit_conversion: None; source values are fractional soil water content in m3/m3.

pattern_1.transformation: Not reported in source; populate with NA.
